meta.name: Ed Night: Hour Long Clip
meta.description: Underrated stand up and asthmatic wretch Ed Night has been hearing a lot about how you need to be uploading stand up online recently. Well, here it is: the spectre at the feast bursts onto the big screen with a no-holds-barred hour of wailing and moaning in his debut special. Prepare to have your ribs tickled to the max by a deluge of comedy material about all sorts of different topics and subjects. In this must-see 49 minute long hour the two-time Edinburgh Comedy Award nominee (it’s not a science) muses on submarine malfunctions, meditates on having his pets destroyed by the government, and artfully navigates the thorny issue of self-checkout machines with heart as well as humour. Of course it isn’t perfect, but what is?
